parameters.name: numRare
parameters.description: Number of rare stimuli per half

parameters.name: numCommon
parameters.description: Number of common stimuli per half

parameters.name: doheader
parameters.description: Whether a header should appear during test reminding participant of response key and mapping.

parameters.name: usefade
parameters.description: Use smooth fade-in animation to reduce abrupt stimulus onset (fade-out is instant)

parameters.name: fadesteps
parameters.description: Number of fade-in steps at 10ms each (5 steps = 50ms minimum for visible fade; 3-10 recommended)

parameters.name: soa
parameters.description: Stimulus onset asynchrony in milliseconds (time from start of one trial to start of next)
